templates.body: A verified neighbor mentioned some noise after 10pm. Just a friendly heads-up — no need to reply.
A package may have been left at the wrong door near you. You might want to check around.
A friendly heads-up that a vehicle has been parked nearby for a while. Nothing urgent.
A neighbor noticed a pet out in the yard. Just making sure everything is okay.
A gate or door nearby looks like it was left open. Thought you would want to know.
